items.summary: Fix the company logo rendering in the Header and Footer so that it displays correctly and clearly against the Finnish blue and white backgrounds. The logo source is frontend/public/assets/generated/logo-brand.dim_300x80.png. Ensure correct image path, appropriate sizing (preserve original aspect ratio), and that no broken image or placeholder appears.

Update the 'Book Your Free 15-Minute Launch Readiness Call' button in the FinalCTASection so that clicking it opens a mailto link to pankaj.kumar@test2deploy.eu. The button should render as an anchor tag (or use window.location) with href="mailto:pankaj.kumar@test2deploy.eu" rather than a non-functional button.
